sampleResults.title: Michigan AD says Dusty May has agreed on deal to stay Wolverines coach 'for many years to come'
sampleResults.description: Michigan coach Dusty May has agreed on a deal that will have him continuing to lead the Wolverines “for many years to come,” according to athletic director Warde Manuel. Manuel made the comment Saturday during a ceremony celebrating Michigan’s NCAA...
